title: Enqueue a job and assert it was enqueued
prompt: Write an ExUnit test `MyApp.OrdersTest` that uses `Oban.Testing` to verify that calling `MyApp.Orders.place_order(1, 99)` enqueues `MyApp.Workers.OrderFulfillmentWorker` with args `%{"order_id" => 1, "quantity" => 99}`. Assume `:testing` mode is `:manual` in test config. The test should call `assert_enqueued/1` with `worker:` and `args:` options. Write to `test/my_app/orders_test.exs`.
tier_rationale: Canonical `assert_enqueued/1` usage; the trap is again atom vs string keys.
